content_html:
The Talk Show Live From WWDC 2026

The annual live audience episode of The Talk Show during the week of WWDC. John Gruber will be joined by one or more special guests. Doors open at 6 pm. Show starts at 7 pm.

Tickets Prices in USD

Additional Information

A full assortment of beverages, including top-shelf liquor and quality beer, will be available. Attendees who wish to partake in such should bring ID.

summary: If you can make it in person, you should come. The California Theater is a beautiful big theater and tickets are still available . You can also watch tonight’s show in live stereoscopic immersive in the Theater app from Sandwich Vision on Vision Pro. A purchase of the ticket to the live show, the Theater app for $12.99, is also good for replay forever — wit…
title: The Talk Show Live From WWDC: Tonight, In-Person and Streaming
